html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
The Hallowed Trinkets are only available during Hallowed Nights. They can be found scattered around the world, digging the Graves, or destroying the Ancient Pseudoscience Station. They can be traded with the Pig King for various amounts of Gold Nuggets and 8-9 Halloween Candies. If the player is wearing costumes, Pig King will give more Halloween Candies. Outside of the Hallowed Nights event, the Pig King will not give Halloween Candies. The Hallowed Trinkets stack up to 40 items. The Trinkets can also be used as a Catcoon toy.

Contents

  • 1 Cubic Zirconia Ball
  • 2 Spider Ring
  • 3 Monkey Paw
  • 4 Empty Elixir
  • 5 Faux Fangs
  • 6 Broken Stake
  • 7 Binoculars
  • 8 Lone Glove
  • 9 Snail Scale
  • 10 Goop Canister
  • 11 Toy Cobra
  • 12 Crocodile Toy
  • 13 Broken Terrarium
  • 14 Odd Radio
  • 15 Broken Hairdryer

Cubic Zirconia Ball

Cubic Zirconia Ball is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.

×8-9

Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
The Hallowed Trinkets are only available during Hallowed Nights. They can be found scattered around the world, digging the Graves, or destroying the Ancient Pseudoscience Station. They can be traded with the Pig King for various amounts of Gold Nuggets and 8-9 Halloween Candies. If the player is wearing costumes, Pig King will give more Halloween Candies. Outside of the Hallowed Nights event, the Pig King will not give Halloween Candies. The Hallowed Trinkets stack up to 40 items. The Trinkets can also be used as a Catcoon toy.
Contents
1 Cubic Zirconia Ball
2 Spider Ring
3 Monkey Paw
4 Empty Elixir
5 Faux Fangs
6 Broken Stake
7 Binoculars
8 Lone Glove
9 Snail Scale
10 Goop Canister
11 Toy Cobra
12 Crocodile Toy
13 Broken Terrarium
14 Odd Radio
15 Broken Hairdryer
Cubic Zirconia Ball[edit | edit source]
Cubic Zirconia Ball
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_32"
“I know someone who'd have a ball with this!”
–Wilson
“Just a big dumb ball.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang does not like spooky magics.”
–Wolfgang
“When I gaze into the ball I see... nothing. Apropos.”
–Wendy
“THE FUTURE IS CLEAR AS MUD”
–WX-78
“Oh, I got my hopes up for a nice crystal ball.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather my future be a surprise.”
–Woodie
“Amateur magic for children.”
–Maxwell
“Reveal mine destiny, öh great fates!”
–Wigfrid
“It's not bouncy. What's the point?”
–Webber
“I see right through this sort of stuff.”
–Warly
“Ball!”
–Wormwood
“It's not the real thing.”
–Winona
“If I look inside what will I see?”
–Wortox
“Can see cute face in it!”
–Wurt
“Will it tell me my future?”
–Walter
“It'll only show you one possible future.”
–Wanda
Cubic Zirconia Ball is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Spider Ring[edit | edit source]
Spider Ring
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_33"
“I hope this doesn't attract spiders.”
–Wilson
“Ewww! Who would ever wear that!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not wear creepy finger-spider.”
–Wolfgang
“It's very fetching.”
–Wendy
“AWFUL SPIDER JUNK”
–WX-78
“A decorative arachnid adornment! How darling!”
–Wickerbottom
“Creepy.”
–Woodie
“The opposite of dapper.”
–Maxwell
“The creature has been förever imprisöned upön the ring.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a friend for our finger!!”
–Webber
“It wouldn't go with my look.”
–Warly
“Hello? Oh. Not alive”
–Wormwood
“It's a plastic creepy crawly.”
–Winona
“No fun! It won't fit over my claw.”
–Wortox
“Who ever seen such tiny Spiderfolk?”
–Wurt
“Aw, I thought it was a real spider...”
–Walter
“I keep forgetting it's not real!”
–Wanda
Spider Ring is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Monkey Paw[edit | edit source]
Monkey Paw
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_34"
“Let's make a wish. For science.”
–Wilson
“Ughhh! That's so nasty!”
–Willow
“Is soft, but spooky.”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps a curse could end our suffering.”
–Wendy
“I WISH FOR MORE WISHES”
–WX-78
“The paw grants three wishes, with terribly ironic results. So the story goes.”
–Wickerbottom
“That right there's a bad time waitin' to happen.”
–Woodie
“I'm done tampering with magical oddities, thank-you.”
–Maxwell
“Begöne, föul magic!”
–Wigfrid
“The monkey probably needed that.”
–Webber
“I know better than to mess with this.”
–Warly
“Where's rest?”
–Wormwood
“I wish for more wishes.”
–Winona
“I like my claws much better”
–Wortox
“Seem safe, florp.”
–Wurt
“Nothing bad ever happened from wishing on a monkey's paw!”
–Walter
“There's no need to be afraid of curses if you're clever enough to outsmart them.”
–Wanda
Monkey Paw is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Empty Elixir[edit | edit source]
Empty Elixir
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_35"
“Hard to find a good flask around here.”
–Wilson
“Hey Wes! Dare you to drink the last bit!”
–Willow
“Little potion make Wolfgang mighty?”
–Wolfgang
“Neither half empty, nor half full.”
–Wendy
“THE CONTENTS PROBABLY KILLED A HUMAN. HAHA”
–WX-78
“Odorless. I believe it may have been sugar water.”
–Wickerbottom
“Doesn't even have a label.”
–Woodie
“I'm not in the habit of imbibing strange liquids.”
–Maxwell
“Twas a pöisön, möst assuredly.”
–Wigfrid
“I kinda wanna drink what's left, but he won't let me.”
–Webber
“Whatever was inside is gone now.”
–Warly
“Empty”
–Wormwood
“Someone drank it already.”
–Winona
“The drink's been drunk, so now it's junk!”
–Wortox
“Somebody drank it, florp.”
–Wurt
“Looks like someone already drank it.”
–Walter
“Whatever it held, it's gone now.”
–Wanda
Empty Elixir is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Faux Fangs[edit | edit source]
Faux Fangs
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_36"
“I might need these after all that candy.”
–Wilson
“Pfft, they're not even sharp.”
–Willow
“Gah! Do not scare Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“Now Webber and I can match.”
–Wendy
“TEETH ARE FOR FILTHY FOOD-CHOMPING FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“Dunk those in boiling water before wearing them, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“More intimidating than beaver teeth.”
–Woodie
“Permanently bared.”
–Maxwell
“Evidence öf the undead. Stay wary, my allies!”
–Wigfrid
“We've already got some, thanks.”
–Webber
“Oh dear, how spooky!”
–Warly
“Pokey teeth”
–Wormwood
“Chomp chomp.”
–Winona
“Mine are much more impressive.”
–Wortox
“Good chompers!”
–Wurt
“Those are just fakes, I want to see real vampire teeth!”
–Walter
“I don't think it's a good idea to put things we find lying around here in our mouths.”
–Wanda
Faux Fangs is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Broken Stake[edit | edit source]
Broken Stake
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_37"
“I don't believe in the supernatural.”
–Wilson
“Looks like firewood to me.”
–Willow
“Stab-stick is useless now.”
–Wolfgang
“Drive it through my heart and be done.”
–Wendy
“NOT EVEN A WEAPON”
–WX-78
“Luckily it is much too brittle to inflict any real damage.”
–Wickerbottom
“What a waste of wood, eh?”
–Woodie
“I told you people, I am *not* a vampire!”
–Maxwell
“För warding öff Löki's miniöns.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe we should hide this before someone gets hurt.”
–Webber
“How ominous.”
–Warly
“Oh. What happened?”
–Wormwood
“Doesn't seem worth fixing.”
–Winona
“Heehee, you couldn't kill me!”
–Wortox
“Didn't break it!! Found like this!”
–Wurt
“I hope the vampire's okay.”
–Walter
“Somewhere there's a vampire having a very bad day.”
–Wanda
Broken Stake is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2016. It can be traded with the Pig King for 1 Gold Nugget and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Binoculars[edit | edit source]
Binoculars
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_38"
“I think it came from another world. One with grifts.”
–Wilson
“It makes stuff look small no matter which way I turn it.”
–Willow
“Is making tiny friends look tinier!”
–Wolfgang
“It makes the world look as insignificant as I feel.”
–Wendy
“MY OPTICS ALREADY POSSESS ZOOM FUNCTIONALITY”
–WX-78
“This simply does not work right.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like a pair of binoculars.”
–Woodie
“I don't know how they got here.”
–Maxwell
“There is a tiny wörld trapped within!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha! Everything looks so small!”
–Webber
“I don't want that near my eyes.”
–Warly
“Makes things big!”
–Wormwood
“Hope no one's been snoopin' on us.”
–Winona
“The size of the world is a matter of perspective.”
–Wortox
“Can see forever!”
–Wurt
“I can almost see into space with these!”
–Walter
“It helps me see the way ahead.”
–Wanda
Binoculars is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2017. It can be traded with the Pig King for 3 Gold Nuggets and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
×3
×8-9
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

Lone Glove
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_39"
“I wonder where the other one is?”
–Wilson
“Who needs just one glove?”
–Willow
“Is just one glove.”
–Wolfgang
“One lonely half of a pair.”
–Wendy
“IT IS A RED GLOVE”
–WX-78
“It appears to be an abandoned glove.”
–Wickerbottom
“Oh, the gloves're comin' off now!”
–Woodie
“What a tacky glove.”
–Maxwell
“Tö arms! The gauntlet has been thröwn döwn!”
–Wigfrid
“That's boring.”
–Webber
“It must be so lonely.”
–Warly
“Doesn't fit”
–Wormwood
“That just ain't right - it's left! Ha!”
–Winona
“I don't usually wear gloves.”
–Wortox
“Keep one claw warm.”
–Wurt
“I guess my hands can take turns.”
–Walter
“I don't think it's from this timeline...”
–Wanda
Lone Glove is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2017. It can be traded with the Pig King for 3 Gold Nuggets and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.

Snail Scale
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_40"
“Holding it makes me feel like bartering.”
–Wilson
“Snails are gross!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang has no use for tiny garbage.”
–Wolfgang
“The weight of the world rests upon me.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO NEED FOR IT”
–WX-78
“What a cute little mollusk shaped scale!”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a snail-shaped scale, eh?”
–Woodie
“One hundred percent to scale.”
–Maxwell
“I have nö use for such things.”
–Wigfrid
“Haha, it looks like a snail shell.”
–Webber
“Mm. Escargot.”
–Warly
“Can't use it”
–Wormwood
“Not sure what to do with it. I'm weighing my options.”
–Winona
“Snips and snails and puppydog scales.”
–Wortox
“This snail sleeping.”
–Wurt
“I don't know what we'd be measuring out here.”
–Walter
“The needle moves rather sluggishly.”
–Wanda

“Ooo, it's warm.”

–Wolfgang

“This does not seem like it came from this world.”

“It doesn't pick up any of my favourite stations...”

“It keeps making strange sounds.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đồ trang sức thiêng liêng chỉ có sẵn trong Đêm thánh. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy rải rác trên khắp thế giới, đào Mộ hoặc phá hủy Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại. Chúng có thể được trao đổi với Vua Lợn để lấy nhiều Vàng Thỏi và 8-9 Kẹo Halloween. Nếu người chơi mặc trang phục, Vua Lợn sẽ tặng thêm Kẹo Halloween. Ngoài sự kiện Đêm Thánh, Vua Lợn sẽ không tặng Kẹo Halloween. Đồ trang sức thiêng liêng có thể xếp tối đa 40 vật phẩm. Đồ trang sức cũng có thể được sử dụng làm đồ chơi cho Catcoon.
title: Hallowed Trinkets
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{Event|Hallowed Nights}}
The '''Hallowed Trinkets''' are only available during ''[[Hallowed Nights]]''. They can be found scattered around the world, digging the [[Grave/DST|Graves]], or destroying the [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station/DST|Ancient Pseudoscience Station]]. They can be traded with the [[Pig King]] for various amounts of [[Gold Nugget]]s and 8-9 [[Halloween Candies]]. If the player is wearing costumes, Pig King will give more Halloween Candies. Outside of the Hallowed Nights event, the Pig King will not give Halloween Candies. The Hallowed Trinkets stack up to 40 items. The Trinkets can also be used as a [[Catcoon]] toy.

=={{Pic|32|Cubic Zirkonia Ball}} Cubic Zirconia Ball==
{{Object Infobox

|stack=40}}
{{Quotes

|willow = Just a big dumb ball.
|wolfgang = Wolfgang does not like spooky magics.
|wendy = When I gaze into the ball I see... nothing. Apropos.
|wx78 = THE FUTURE IS CLEAR AS MUD
|wickerbottom = Oh, I got my hopes up for a nice crystal ball.
|woodie = I'd rather my future be a surprise.
|maxwell = Amateur magic for children.
|wigfrid = Reveal mine destiny, öh great fates!
|webber = It's not bouncy. What's the point?
|warly = I see right through this sort of stuff.
|wormwood = Ball!
|winona = It's not the real thing.
|wortox = If I look inside what will I see?
|wurt = Can see cute face in it!
|walter = Will it tell me my future?
|wanda = It'll only show you one possible future.
|choose = wurt
}}

'''Broken Hairdryer''' is a Hallowed Nights exclusive item, which was introduced in 2017. It can be traded with the [[Pig King]] for 3 [[Gold Nugget]]s and 8-9 Halloween Candies, if traded during Hallowed Nights event.
